description_long: This shotgun features a compact, tactical design with a predominantly green and black color scheme accented by orange and metallic copper details. The body is angular and robust, with a short, cylindrical barrel extending from the front, surrounded by metallic rings. The grip is ergonomic and black, designed for one-handed operation, and the top of the receiver includes a tan-colored sight or rail mount. The side panels display intricate mechanical detailing, including visible screws and a transparent section revealing internal components. The overall construction suggests a modern, possibly futuristic, urban combat weapon with a focus on durability and ease of handling.
description: A compact, green and black tactical shotgun with orange and copper accents, featuring a short barrel and ergonomic grip.
description_view_0: Side view showing the green body, black grip, orange accents, and the tan sight on top.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening, metallic rings, and symmetrical design.
description_view_2: Opposite side view revealing more mechanical details and the transparent section on the receiver.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the top-mounted sight, grip, and the alignment of the barrel.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short cylindrical barrel with metallic rings and no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
